title: dasyglossum anthoxanthum
intro: Dasyglossum anthoxanthum, also known as Anthoxanthum nitens, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the grass family, Poaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Dasyglossum anthoxanthum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
